issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for plugin failures or build errors.

scenarios.name: convert-vue-app-with-camera-file-upload
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits native platform detection; Response B lacks Filesystem.writeFile and platform detection, so A scores higher.

scenarios.name: add-push-notifications-and-prep-app-store
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A does not mention Capacitor push notifications or the required steps.
